description: Unique identifier for each property (format: PROP-XXXXXX)
City where the property is located (Bangalore / Mumbai / Delhi / Hyderabad)
Specific locality / neighbourhood of the property (20 localities)
Tier classification of the locality (Premium / Standard / Affordable)
Type of property (Apartment / Villa / Independent House / Studio / Penthouse / Row House)
Number of Bedrooms, Hall, and Kitchen units (1–5)
Number of bathrooms (1–6)
Number of balconies (0–4)
Total built-up area including walls and common spaces (sq ft, 300–8000)
Usable carpet/floor area excluding walls (sq ft, approx 80–88% of built-up area)
Floor number on which the property is located (0 = Ground)
Total number of floors in the building
Categorical floor level (Ground / Low (1-4) / Mid (5-9) / High (10-19) / Top (20+))
Direction the main entrance faces (N / S / E / W / NE / NW / SE / SW)
Furnishing level of the property (Unfurnished / Semi-Furnished / Fully Furnished)
Age of the property in years (0 = newly constructed, max 40)
Number of dedicated parking spaces (0–5)
Security facility score on a 0–10 scale
Whether a gym/fitness centre is available (1 = Yes, 0 = No)
Whether a swimming pool is available (1 = Yes, 0 = No)
Whether full power backup is available (1 = Yes, 0 = No)
Whether a lift/elevator is available (1 = Yes, 0 = No)
Monthly maintenance fee in INR (500–25,000)
Distance to nearest city/business centre in km (0.5–45.0)
Distance to nearest metro/subway station in km (0.1–15.0)
Number of schools within a 2 km radius (0–10)
Number of hospitals within a 3 km radius (0–8)
Whether this is a New or Resale transaction
Actual property price in Indian Rupees Lakhs (10–1000 Lakhs)
Target variable — price tier of the property (High / Low) based on top 35th percentile
